title: Starter Hangout
fantasy: A cozy social plaza where friends can meet and show off progression.
coreLoop: Players move through a hub, interact with landmarks, and trigger short social activities.
socialLoop: Small shared prompts and hangout stations keep players near each other.
progressionHook: Earn style tokens by trying activities with friends.
serverAuthoritativeRules: The server owns rewards and activity state.
Shared interactions must be validated on the server.
clientFeedback: Celebrate rewards with lightweight UI feedback.
acceptanceTests: Players can identify the main hangout fantasy within 10 seconds.
At least one interaction clearly requires or encourages other players nearby.
Progression is visible but does not dominate the social loop.
